PreEngagementPhase-Form-Description: Thank you for contacting National Child Helpline (116). To chat with a counsellor, please type your name and select the Start Chat button.
MessageInputDisabledReasonHold: Thank you very much for this information. We'll transfer you now. Please hold for a counsellor.
